selectServerLocation: Please select the server location to which your account belongs.
passwordLength8: Password must be at least 8 characters.
passwordLength32: Password must be at most 32 characters.
verifyEmail: Verify your login email to reset your password.
checkSpamFolder: Can't find it? Please check your spam folder.
pleaseLog: Please log in with your new password.
noAccountAssociated: No account is associated with this email. Please check the email address.
deployTip: This will deploy the newest firmware.
clientAddedSuccessfullyTip: An email has been sent to the provided email address containing login information, including the generated password. Please ask the organization to use the information in the email to log in and complete registration.
deleteTip: This will delete the organization and remove all dada and accounts under it.
organizationNameTip: The organization's name. This name is visible to the organization and can be changed.
loginEmailTip1: The login email for the organization's Admin Account. This cannot be changed once set.
loginEmailTip2: An invitation will be sent to the same email containing the login information, including a randomly generated initial password.
passwordChangedSuccessfullyTip: You will now be logged out. Please log in again.
name: Name
oldPasswordNotEmpty: This Old Password cannot be empty.
maintenanceTip: Our servers are temporarily unavailable due to maintenance or upgrades. Please check back later. Thank you for your patience!
internalServerError: Internal server error, Please contact pontosense service.
sessionExpiredTip: The login session has expired due to the session duration limit, important account changes, or a login from another location. Please log in again.
captchaVerifyDescription: We're sorry, but you couldn't pass our security checks. Please ensure your browser settings allow scripts and cookies, and disable any privacy tools or VPNs that might interfere.
priceNotNumber: This price only supports integers or at most two decimal places.
priceNotValidate: Please enter a amount between 1 and 10,000.
periodText: The billing time is the second day of each month at 05:00 in the UTC+0 time zone.
organizationAccountExecutiveTip: The account executive is the associated sales team member who is managing this organization.
errorTip1: The device has stopped functioning. Please reboot the device to see if the issue is resolved. If the problem persists, please contact our support team for further assistance.
errorTip2: The device's mounting alignment is incorrect, possibly due to improper installation, loosening over time, or falling off the wall. Adjust the device mounting to ensure proper alignment.
queryTimeRangeLimit: The query time range must be within 31 days.
startDateEndDateTip: The start date cannot be later than the end date.
statsPeriod: View statistics for this time period (time zone is UTC0)
roleTip:
Distributor:
When distributor selected, the organization will have the permission to access the distribute  menu.

Tenant:
When Tenant selected, the organization will have the permission to access the Manage and Monitoring menu.
stripeSubAccountTip: The sub account ID that this organization owns is on Stripe.
commissionRateTip: Please enter a valid number: 0-100 (only integers or up to two decimal places)
loginNewVersionAveWeb: A new version has been detected. Click to refresh the update.
reassignOwnerNote: Both the current and new administraters will be notified of the access permission change by emails.
keepAccount: Would you like to keep the current owner's account?
reassignOwnerTip: You're transferring ownership to a new user.
reassignOwnerDesc: Do you want to keep the current owner's account active as a regular user, or remove it from the system?
assistanceNeeded: Was assistance needed to get up?
tenantNameTip: This name is visible to the organization and can be changed.
loginEmailTip:
The login email for the organization's admin account. This cannot be changed once set.

addUsersFailedText: Failed partly due to some reasons. Please download the form to view and modify it before adding again.
devicefail001: Failed to add devices: device already linked to a reseller.
devicefail002: Failed to add some devices due to errors. Please download the report to view the details, make corrections, and upload the file again.
loginlimit0001: We apologize. You have temporarily exceeded the maximum number of login attempts. Please try again later.
price0002: Important: The currency change will apply to the next billing cycle invoice and will not affect current existing subscription.
price0007: Initial invoice price must not be zero, you can modify the price to zero later.
integrate0002: This tenant will be set as integrator and provide integration service for authorized orgnizations.
firmware0010: This will release the newest uploaded firmware, continue?
license0009: Search Charged Licenses by Searching Tenant ID and Invoice Billing Month.
